title: Artificial Intelligence: A Guide for Thinking Humans
author: Melanie Mitchell
summary: A grounded, accessible overview of AI's capabilities, limitations, and social implications written for a broad audience.

title: Prediction Machines: The Simple Economics of Artificial Intelligence
author: Ajay Agrawal, Joshua Gans, Avi Goldfarb
summary: Explains AI as a prediction technology and explores the business implications for decision-making and strategy.

title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
author: Martin Kleppmann
summary: A practical guide to building scalable, reliable data systems — useful when engineering production AI systems.
